title: St. Angelo Fort
tagline: St. Angelo Fort — heritage city of Kerala

overview.short: St. Angelo Fort is a much-loved heritage city in Kerala, known for forts and architecture.
overview.description: St. Angelo Fort (also known as Kannur Fort or Kannur Kotta) is a fort facing the Arabian Sea, situated 3 km from Kannur, Kerala.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Mappila Bay
topPlaces.description: Mappila Bay (or Moppila Bay) is a natural harbor situated at Ayikkara in Kannur Municipal Corporation, Kerala state of South India. On one side of the bay is Fort St.

topPlaces.name: Ayikkara
topPlaces.description: Ayikkara is one of the 55 divisions of Kannur Municipal Corporation in Kannur district of Kerala state, India. Kannur fort, and the Mappila Bay is near Ayikkara.

topPlaces.name: Arakkal Museum
topPlaces.description: The Arakkal Museum is a museum dedicated to the Arakkal family, the only Muslim royal family in Kerala, India. The museum is actually a section of the Arakkalkettu (Arakkal Royal Palace).

topPlaces.name: Kannur Cantonment
topPlaces.description: Kannur Cantonment (or Cannanore Cantonment the old English name), situated in Burnassery or Burnshire(the anglicized name), is a cantonment town in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala, between Kannur town and Kannur City. The cantonment was a military camp for Portuguese, Dutch and British rulers, and is now the headquarters of Defence Security Corps.

topPlaces.name: Chirakkalkulam
topPlaces.description: Chirakkalkulam is a small residential area near Kannur town of Kannur District, Kerala state, South India. Chirakkalkulam is located between Thayatheru and Kannur City.

topPlaces.name: Roman Catholic Diocese of Kannur
topPlaces.description: Pope John Paul II created the Diocese of Kannur in the Ecclesiastical Province of Kozhikode in India by bifurcating the Diocese of Calicut on 9 December 1998. The diocese consists of the Latin Catholics of Malabar residing in the revenue districts of Kannur and Kasaragod.

topPlaces.description: St. Michaels Anglo Indian Higher Secondary School, Kannur, is a Govt.

topPlaces.name: Fort Road, Kannur
topPlaces.description: Fort Road is a busy shopping area in Kannur town of Kerala, South India. The road is so named, because it leads to the St.

items.note: Mappila Bay (or Moppila Bay) is a natural harbor situated at Ayikkara in Kannur Municipal Corporation, Kerala state of South India. On one side of the bay is Fort St.
Ayikkara is one of the 55 divisions of Kannur Municipal Corporation in Kannur district of Kerala state, India. Kannur fort, and the Mappila Bay is near Ayikkara.
The Arakkal Museum is a museum dedicated to the Arakkal family, the only Muslim royal family in Kerala, India. The museum is actually a section of the Arakkalkettu (Arakkal Royal Palace).

Kannur Cantonment (or Cannanore Cantonment the old English name), situated in Burnassery or Burnshire(the anglicized name), is a cantonment town in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala, between Kannur town and Kannur City. The cantonment was a military camp for Portuguese, Dutch and British rulers, and is now the headquarters of Defence Security Corps.
Chirakkalkulam is a small residential area near Kannur town of Kannur District, Kerala state, South India. Chirakkalkulam is located between Thayatheru and Kannur City.

Pope John Paul II created the Diocese of Kannur in the Ecclesiastical Province of Kozhikode in India by bifurcating the Diocese of Calicut on 9 December 1998. The diocese consists of the Latin Catholics of Malabar residing in the revenue districts of Kannur and Kasaragod.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Angelo Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Angelo Fort is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Angelo Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (102 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (126 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Angelo Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Angelo Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Angelo Fort?
faq.a: Stays in St. Angelo Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Angelo Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mappila Bay, Ayikkara, Arakkal Museum, Kannur Cantonment, Chirakkalkulam.
